reason: Contains pro-ISIS indicators including celebration of attacks against US forces, use of 'Islamic State' hashtag (#الدولة_الإسلامية), and 'Ansar Al-Sharia' hashtag (#انصار_الشريعة) which is associated with ISIS supporters. The celebratory tone about US military casualties also aligns with ISIS messaging patterns.
